testcase.failure:
def test_get_cert_chain_success(): """Validate the issuer for microsoft.com with ms_pem"""
host = "github.com" port = 443
github = get_certificate_chain(host, port)
> assert github[1] == certs.github_issuer_pem E AssertionError: assert '-----BEGIN C...FICATE-----\n' == '-----BEGIN C...FICATE-----\n' E E -----BEGIN CERTIFICATE----- E + MIIDXzCCAuagAwIBAgIQNuBZ7YiN1Xrt1XC2cn+b2jAKBggqhkjOPQQDAzBfMQsw E + CQYDVQQGEwJHQjEYMBYGA1UEChMPU2VjdGlnbyBMaW1pdGVkMTYwNAYDVQQDEy1T E + ZWN0aWdvIFB1YmxpYyBTZXJ2ZXIgQXV0aGVudGljYXRpb24gUm9vdCBFNDYwHhcN E + MjEwMzIyMDAwMDAwWhcNMzYwMzIxMjM1OTU5WjBgMQswCQYDVQQGEwJHQjEYMBYG E + A1UEChMPU2VjdGlnbyBMaW1pdGVkMTcwNQYDVQQDEy5TZWN0aWdvIFB1YmxpYyBT... testcase.name: test_build_ocsp_request_success

failure.message:

testcase.failure:
def test_build_ocsp_request_success(): """test a successful build_ocsp_request function invocation"""
host = "github.com" cert_chain = get_certificate_chain(host) ocsp_request_data = build_ocsp_request(cert_chain)
> assert ocsp_request_data == certs.github_ocsp_data E AssertionError: assert b'0Q0O0M0K0I0...a4vP\xe8K\xbe' == b'0Q0O0M0K0I0...\x0e\xb7B\xa5' E E At index 23 diff: b'\xb7' != b'\xcf' E Use -v to get more diff
